import json
import re

# Read the notebook file
with open\('1_sfm_pipeline.ipynb', 'r'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

# Find all cells related to Part 4 or question 4b
relevant_cells = []
for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells']\):
    cell_id = cell.get\('id', f'cell-{i}'\)
    cell_type = cell.get\('cell_type', ''\)
    
    # Get cell content
    if cell_type == 'markdown':
        content = ''.join\(cell.get\('source', []\)\)
    elif cell_type == 'code':
        content = ''.join\(cell.get\('source', []\)\)
    else:
        content = ''
    
    # Check if cell is related to Part 4 or 4b
    if re.search\(r'\(Part\\s*4|question\\s*4b|4b|4\\\(b\\\)\)', content, re.IGNORECASE\):
        relevant_cells.append\({
            'index': i,
            'cell_id': cell_id,
            'cell_type': cell_type,
            'content': content,
            'outputs': cell.get\('outputs', []\)
        }\)

# Print results
print\(f"Found {len\(relevant_cells\)} cells related to Part 4/4b:\\n"\)
for cell in relevant_cells:
    print\(f"{'='*80}"\)
    print\(f"Cell Index: {cell['index']}, Cell ID: {cell['cell_id']}, Type: {cell['cell_type']}"\)
    print\(f"{'='*80}"\)
    print\(cell['content'][:2000] if len\(cell['content']\) > 2000 else cell['content']\)
    print\(\)

EOF)
